name: Pydio Cells API
description: REST API for Pydio Cells, the open-source file sharing and collaboration platform. Provides 248+ endpoints covering tree/file operations, user management, ACLs, roles, workspaces, sharing, activity streams, configuration, search, jobs/scheduler, authentication, frontend, and meta services.
